cells.data:
VIM
SHORTCUTS

<leader>b = BuffergatorToggle
<leader>m = CtrlPMixed
<leader>n = NERDTreeToggle
<leader>p = CtrlP
<leader>r = TernRefs
<leader>t = TernDef

Plugins
NERDTree - https://github.com/scrooloose/nerdtree
CTRLP - https://github.com/kien/ctrlp.vim
:help ctrlp-commands
:help ctrlp-options

YouCompleteMe
Ctrl-O - Jump Back
Ctrl-I - Jump Forward
:h jumplist

https://github.com/ggreer/the_silver_searcher
brew install the_silver_searcher
brew install automake pkg_config pcre xz

Ack
https://github.com/mileszs/ack.vim

Git
https://github.com/tpope/vim-fugitive

TagBar
https://majutsushi.github.io/tagbar/
nmap <F8> :TagbarToggle<CR>

CTags
brew install ctags
which ctags
check .zshrc for correct path not commented out
reference: http://scholarslab.org/research-and-development/code-spelunking-with-ctags-and-vim/
Auto Tags: https://github.com/xolox/vim-easytags
